# `btpc inspect`

<!-- Generated by `scripts/generate-cli-reference.sh`; do not edit. -->

Inspect validated metainfo without reading payload files

**Parent:** [`btpc`](index.md)

See [Configuration and global flags](../configuration.md) and [Exit codes and streams](../index.md#exit-codes-and-streams).

## Synopsis

```text
Usage: btpc inspect [OPTIONS] <INPUT>
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `<INPUT>` | Metainfo file to read |

## Options

| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `--json` | Emit versioned JSON to stdout Default: `false`. |
| `--field, <FIELDS>` | Select a field; may be repeated Values: `mode`, `name`, `total-size`, `piece-length`, `piece-count`, `file-count`, `hash-v1`, `hash-v2`, `private`, `trackers`, `web-seeds`, `nodes`, `comment`, `creator`, `creation-date`, `source`, `canonicality`, `warnings`, `files`, `unknown-fields`. |
| `--files` | Include the flat file listing Default: `false`. |
| `--tree` | Render files as a deterministic tree Default: `false`. |
| `--path-encoding, <PATH_ENCODING>` | Encode raw torrent paths Values: `utf8`, `escaped`, `hex`. Default: `utf8`. |
| `--offset, <OFFSET>` | Skip this many file rows Default: `0`. |
| `--limit, <LIMIT>` | Limit returned file rows |
| `--format, <FORMAT>` | Select output representation Values: `human`, `plain`, `json`, `json-pretty`, `tsv`. |
| `--pretty` | Use the expanded human renderer Default: `false`. |
| `--max-input-bytes, <MAX_INPUT_BYTES>` | Maximum metainfo bytes accepted while loading |
| `--max-owned-bytes, <MAX_OWNED_BYTES>` | Maximum estimated owned allocation while loading |
| `--max-integer-digits, <MAX_INTEGER_DIGITS>` | Maximum decimal digits accepted in one bencode integer |
| `-h, --help` | Print help |

## Global options

| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `--config, <PATH>` | Use this configuration file when configuration loading is enabled |
| `--no-config` | Disable implicit and environment-selected configuration Default: `false`. |
| `--color, <COLOR>` | Control colored terminal output Values: `auto`, `always`, `never`. |
| `-v, --verbose` | Increase diagnostic verbosity; may be repeated Default: `0`. |
| `-q, --quiet` | Suppress human summaries, warnings, and progress Default: `false`. |

## Example

```console
$ btpc inspect --help
```
